audio_clips.text: V CREATE DIGITAL PRESENTS....
Being A Kid Again....
Reveal a square piece of paper centered on a wooden surface.
"Turn the square paper 45 degrees to make a diamond."
Fold paper diagonally, smooth, unfold.
Fold the square paper diagonally, colored side down, smooth the crease, then align the top point with the bottom edge.
Fold the square paper diagonally to form a triangle, ensuring the colored side is facing down.
Fold the square paper diagonally into a triangle, aligning the edges perfectly. Smooth the crease, then unfold to reveal the diagonal line.
Fold the square paper diagonally, colored side down, smooth the crease, then unfold.
Fold square paper diagonally, color down, crease, unfold.
Fold square paper diagonally, colored side down.
Fold the square paper diagonally into a perfect triangle, aligning the edges precisely.
Smooth the diagonal crease for precision, then unfold and fold each corner to the center, forming smaller triangles.
Aligns the top paper edge with the center crease, forming a small top triangle, then folds the bottom corners up to meet the new triangle's sides.
Flips the paper, repeats the corner folds on the opposite side, and makes precise creases along all edges for sharp definition.
Fold the paper along the existing crease, aligning the top edge with the bottom edge.
Smooth out the fold to create a sharp crease across the paper.
Aligns paper with a vertical crease, draws two dots for eyes, then adds a curved line below for a mouth.
Adds small dots above the mouth for whiskers, then completes the dog's face on the origami.
Rotate the origami dog face to show its front, then place it flat on the table. Lift it slightly, then set it back down.

THANKS YOU FOR WATCHING THE VIDEO.
SUBSCRIBE TO SEE MORE VIDEOS AT : http://www.youtube.com/BeingAKidAgain
Display a static blue screen with white text centered.

video_name: How to make an origami dog face step by step.
